text:
Created attachment 217452
Update port: audio/playumidi: Fails to build on FreeBSD 13-current

Due to the duplicate definition of global variables on the source, a build failure error occurred on FreeBSD 13-current.
Therefore, we also fixed and updated the port.

Please update the port.

----
Koine Yuusuke(koinec@users.osdn.me)
